name: Low Country Seafood "Boil
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Unpeeled large fresh shrimp, peeled and deveined
2 small Ears corn, cut in half crosswise
2 tablespoons Butter or margarine, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place the oven bag in a 13 x 9-inch baking dish.
3. Add flour; twist the end and shake to distribute evenly.
4. Add shrimp and the next six ingredients to the bag.
5. Squeeze the bag to blend the ingredients.
6. Arrange everything in a single layer.
7. Close the bag with a nylon tie and cut 6 (1/2-inch) slits on top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until shrimp are opaque and corn is tender.
9. Serve in shallow bowls with hot sauce and garnish if desired.
